scripts.check: biome check && tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist dist-bundle && cargo clean --manifest-path packages/sandbox/Cargo.toml && cargo clean --manifest-path packages/orchd/Cargo.toml
scripts.build: bun run fmt && tsc -b && bun run build:rust
scripts.build:rust: cargo build --release --manifest-path packages/sandbox/Cargo.toml && cargo build --release --manifest-path packages/orchd/Cargo.toml
scripts.compile: bun run build && bun run scripts/build-binary.ts && bun build ./dist-bundle/cli.js --compile --no-compile-autoload-bunfig --outfile dist-bundle/piko && cp packages/orchd/target/release/orchd dist-bundle/orchd
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run test
